products.name: Classic White Dress Shirt
products.description: Premium cotton dress shirt with tailored fit. Perfect for business meetings and formal events. Features a button-down collar, reinforced stitching, and breathable fabric. Available in multiple colors.

products.name: Slim Fit Navy Chinos
products.description: Modern slim fit chinos crafted from breathable cotton twill. Features a mid-rise waist, clean front styling, and comfortable stretch. Perfect for casual office wear or weekend outings.

products.name: Wool Blazer - Navy
products.description: Elegant wool blend blazer with notch lapels and fully lined interior. Perfect for professional settings and evening events. Premium craftsmanship with hand-finished details.

products.name: Casual Cotton Polo Shirt
products.description: Relaxed fit cotton polo with breathable pique fabric. Features a three-button placket and embroidered logo detail. Ideal for casual weekends or outdoor activities.

products.name: Tailored Navy Wool Suit
products.description: Two-piece tailored suit in premium navy wool. Includes matching jacket and trousers with side adjusters. Made with 100% virgin wool for superior quality and comfort.

products.name: Genuine Leather Belt - Brown
products.description: Full-grain leather belt with brass buckle. Genuine leather construction ensures durability and develops unique character over time. Timeless accessory for any wardrobe.

products.name: Elegant Maxi Dress - Emerald
products.description: Graceful emerald maxi dress with flowing fabric. Features delicate lace detailing and a flattering silhouette. Perfect for formal events, weddings, and special occasions.

products.name: Modest Blouse with Ruffles
products.description: Beautiful modest blouse with elegant ruffled sleeves and a classic fit. Made from breathable cotton-linen blend. Perfect for layering or wearing alone.

products.name: Flowing Midi Skirt - Floral
products.description: Elegant flowing midi skirt with beautiful floral print. Features an elastic waistband for comfort and a full length for modest wear. Ideal for casual or formal settings.

products.name: Long Sleeve Turtle Neck
products.description: Comfortable long sleeve turtle neck made from premium cotton knit. Perfect for layering or wearing alone. Available in classic colors that match any wardrobe.

products.name: Premium Cardigan - Taupe
products.description: Luxurious cardigan sweater in soft taupe. Features button closures, practical pockets, and a relaxed fit. Perfect for adding warmth and style to any outfit.

products.name: Kids Modest Dress - Blue
products.description: Adorable blue dress perfect for young girls. Features a comfortable fit, durable fabric, and modest design. Easy to care for and available in multiple sizes for growing kids.

products.name: Kids Cotton T-Shirt
products.description: Soft cotton t-shirt for kids with fun designs. Made from organic cotton for comfort and durability. Perfect for everyday wear.

products.name: Kids Shorts - Navy
products.description: Comfortable navy shorts for kids. Features an elastic waistband, pockets, and breathable fabric. Perfect for active play and outdoor adventures.

products.name: Kids Sweater - Cream
products.description: Cozy cream sweater perfect for layering. Made from soft knit fabric that's gentle on delicate skin. Ideal for cooler seasons.

products.name: SDA Hymnal - Modern Edition
products.description: Modern edition SDA Hymnal with contemporary and classic hymns. Hardcover binding with gold embossing. Perfect for personal worship or church use.

products.name: The Great Controversy - Ellen G. White
products.description: Classic spiritual literature exploring the conflict between good and evil. Comprehensive guide for understanding biblical prophecy and church history. Essential reading for SDA members.

products.name: Steps to Christ - Ellen G. White
products.description: Inspirational guide to spiritual transformation and Christian living. Beautiful hardcover edition with quality binding. Perfect gift for spiritual seekers.

products.name: SDA Children's Bible Stories
products.description: Illustrated collection of Bible stories for children. Colorful illustrations and age-appropriate narratives. Perfect for teaching values and faith to young readers.

products.name: Desire of Ages - Ellen G. White
products.description: Comprehensive account of the life of Jesus Christ. Beautiful leather-bound edition with gold details. Essential spiritual reference for deeper understanding of scripture.

products.name: Daily Devotional Guide - 2024
products.description: Practical daily devotional with Bible passages and reflections. Compact size perfect for carrying. Helps develop consistent spiritual growth habits.

products.name: Men's Linen Shirt - Beige
products.description: Breathable linen shirt perfect for warm weather. Relaxed fit with natural texture. Ideal for casual vacation wear or hot climate dressing.

products.name: Women's Pencil Skirt - Black
products.description: Classic black pencil skirt with a sleek silhouette. Features a zipper back and elasticized waist for comfort. Perfect for professional office wear.

products.name: Vegan Leather Handbag
products.description: Elegant vegan leather handbag with sustainable materials. Spacious interior with multiple compartments. Perfect everyday bag with eco-conscious style.

products.name: Kids Religious Pendant Necklace
products.description: Delicate gold-plated necklace with religious pendant. Perfect gift for children. Safe and durable for daily wear.

products.name: Modest Wedding Guest Dress
products.description: Stunning formal dress for weddings and special events. Features elegant draping and modest silhouette. Available in multiple colors.

products.name: Oxford Classic Shoes - Leather
products.description: Premium leather Oxford shoes with classic design. Comfortable cushioned insole and durable sole. Perfect for business or formal occasions.

products.name: Spiritual Growth Journal
products.description: Beautiful guided journal for spiritual reflection and prayer. Includes prompts for meditation and gratitude practice. Premium paper and elegant binding.

products.name: Women's Layered Top
products.description: Stylish layered top with multiple sleeve options. Versatile design perfect for year-round wear. Mix and match with any bottom.

products.name: Men's Dress Socks Collection
products.description: Pack of 5 premium dress socks in assorted colors. Soft merino wool blend for comfort and durability. Perfect complement to any formal outfit.
